code:
import io

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut count = 0
mut in_word = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = string.byte_at(text, i)
  match b
  when Some(v)
    let is_ws = v == 32 or v == 9 or v == 10 or v == 13 or v == 11 or v == 12
    if is_ws
      in_word = false
    else
      if not in_word
        count = count + 1
        in_word = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("#{count}")
